title: Korsk
content:
{{Top|ca|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Korsk |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Able to scrub''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet=Able to eat [[i'fii]] |language= }} {{Quote|I remember once, my crèche-mates—P'loh and Zhul—we took one of the scrubbing korsks and put it in the communal food area. It...''"
"''Ate all the i'fii.|Tahiri Veila and Nem Yim, as the latter realizes that Veila shares some of her memories|}} '''Korsks''' were creatures used by the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] to scrub. When the Yuuzhan Vong [[Shaper caste|shaper]] [[Nen Yim]] was younger, sometime before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the extragalactic Yuuzhan Vong invaded a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] other than their [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|own]], she and a pair of crèche-mates, [[P'loh]] and [[Zhul]], put a korsk in a communal eating area where it proceeded to eat all of the [[i'fii]] [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]]. In [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' during the war, Yim discovered that the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]] shared her memories, including the korsk incident. This led Yim to realize that her own personality had been implanted in Veila's mind during an attempt to make Veila believe that she was a Yuuzhan Vong via [[Shaping protocol|shaping]], a form of Yuuzhan Vong [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineering]]. ==Behind the scenes== Korsks were only mentioned once, in [[Greg Keyes]]' [[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy|''The Final Prophecy'']] released in [[September]] [[2003]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series of novels. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]] [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong creatures]]
